added_items.final_wording: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.

exact_location.heading: 6. Clinical History

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

added_items.rationale: Supports cough timing, pattern, associated symptoms and contextual history for nocturnal cough documentation; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

added_items.final_wording: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with suspected or diagnosed asthma, excluding severe asthma and acute attacks.
source.setting: Primary and specialist diagnosis, monitoring, and chronic asthma management.
source.exclusions: Exact for chronic asthma assessment and monitoring; excludes severe asthma and acute attacks and is not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.4.6 — clinical history, examination, objective tests, and occupational asthma

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.

added_items.rationale: Supports nocturnal respiratory symptoms within asthma assessment for nocturnal cough documentation; no decision is generated.
